block_00: What tools do traders from your region use?
block_01: Many traders from Asia like to incorporate candlestick patterns in their trading approach. Candlesticks gather multiple timeframes in one bar, so the patterns they form may help a trader understand the market state and take advantage of the price movements.
block_02: Among the most popular chart patterns are the Morning Star formation, the Hammer, Three Black Crows and several others that are included in this article. Chart patterns may be equally useful for beginner and professional traders, as they can be combined with other analysis tools.
block_03: Read the full article to find out how to use these candlestick patterns in trading.
